activities.title: Palmeraie Quad Biking
activities.description: Race through Marrakech's lush palm oasis on an exhilarating quad, weaving past Berber villages, mud-brick farmsteads, and open desert trails on a two-hour guided adventure.

activities.title: Camel Ride in the Palmeraie
activities.description: Sway gently through Marrakech's historic palm oasis on the back of a camel — a timeless, meditative experience that connects you with Morocco's nomadic Berber traditions.

activities.title: Hot Air Balloon at Sunrise
activities.description: Drift silently above rose-gold Moroccan landscapes as the sun rises over the Atlas Mountains — a magical, once-in-a-lifetime experience with panoramic views.

tours.title: Ouzoud Waterfalls Day Trip
tours.description: Marvel at Morocco's most spectacular waterfalls — three cascades dropping 110 metres into an emerald gorge, with wild Barbary macaques as your companions.

tours.title: Ourika Valley & Atlas Mountains
tours.description: Journey into the lush Ourika Valley — just an hour from Marrakech — where terraced Berber villages cling to dramatic mountain slopes above a rushing river.

tours.title: Essaouira Coastal Day Trip
tours.description: Trade the medina's heat for the Atlantic breeze in Essaouira — Morocco's wind-swept jewel. Explore UNESCO-listed ramparts, blue fishing boats, and vibrant souks.

transport.title: Airport Transfers
transport.description: Stress-free door-to-door transfers between Marrakech Menara Airport and your hotel or riad. We monitor your flight for delays and always greet you on time.

transport.title: Private Car with Driver
transport.description: Explore Morocco entirely at your own pace. Your professional, English-speaking driver navigates the roads while you focus on the scenery.

transport.title: City-to-City Transfers
transport.description: Comfortable, direct road transfers between Marrakech, Fes, Casablanca, Agadir, and beyond. We turn long drives into part of your Moroccan adventure.
